query: hey can you take a look at this screen? https://www.figma.com/file/abc123/checkout-v3?node-id=42 — it's our checkout redesign and I want feedback before we hand it off to dev
we just finished 8 user interviews for our onboarding flow and i have all the transcripts. can you help me figure out what the main pain points are and what we should fix first?
what should the empty state say when a user has no saved reports yet? we want it to feel encouraging not like an error
my designer flagged that our modal confirm button says 'OK' and our delete button says 'Yes'. she wants me to fix the copy — what should these say?
we're about to launch and legal wants an accessibility audit of our main dashboard. specifically worried about color contrast and keyboard nav for screen reader users
our design system has gotten pretty messy — buttons are named differently across components (btn, button, cta) and spacing is all hardcoded px values. can you help us audit it?
I need to write an interview guide for user research sessions next week. we're trying to understand why enterprise customers churn in the first 90 days
can you generate a handoff spec for this settings page? I need measurements, states, responsive rules, and edge cases so the devs have everything they need
does this navigation structure make sense for mobile? top nav has logo, search icon, hamburger. hamburger opens a drawer with 12 items including nested categories
we're adding a new 'team activity feed' component that doesn't exist in our design system yet. help me spec out variants, states, and tokens
how do I implement a sticky header in CSS that disappears on scroll down and reappears on scroll up?
write unit tests for my form validation logic — the email field uses a regex and I want to cover edge cases
what's the best blue color for a CTA button? should it be #0070f3 or something darker?
review this PR — I added a new UserProfile component and refactored the auth middleware
I want to build a Figma plugin that auto-exports assets to S3 when I press a button. where do I start?
help me set up a storybook for our React component library so designers can browse components
our marketing team wants a landing page redesign. who should I hire — a freelancer or an agency?
explain the difference between serif and sans-serif fonts — just want to understand the basics
I need to add dark mode support to our app. what's the best approach in Tailwind CSS?
can you help me write a product requirements doc for our new search feature? I need user stories and acceptance criteria
